77DsB9kw8u8eKesicT44hGirsj5A2SicGdFPQZZE.label: Pump.fun Team Wallet #1 (CONFIRMED)
77DsB9kw8u8eKesicT44hGirsj5A2SicGdFPQZZE.source: Token Custodian TX trace + Onchain Lens + Lookonchain + CryptoRank
77DsB9kw8u8eKesicT44hGirsj5A2SicGdFPQZZE.notes: Received 3.75B PUMP from Token Custodian on 2025-07-14. Held for 7 months. Distributed entire 3.75B over Feb 16-21, 2026 in small amounts (~12-14M per tx) to 10+ wallet addresses. Main recipient: Wintermute (0.94B, market maker). Other 2.8B distributed across 9+ wallets. 0 PUMP balance remaining. No direct CEX deposits detected. Likely a grant program, liquidity mining rewards, or market maker compensation pool.

8UHpWBnhYNeAQURWjAABp8vSrzfYa69o7sfi65vY.label: PUMP Official Allocation Multisig #2 (CONFIRMED - 20B allocation 2025-07-14)

8UHpWBnhYNeAQURWjAABp8vSrzfYa69o7sfi65vY.notes: CONFIRMED official allocation. Received exactly 20B PUMP from Token Custodian (Cfq1ts1...) on 2025-07-14 — same batch as Team Wallet #1 (77DsB9kw, 3.75B) and Investor Wallet #1 (9Ucygiam, 20B). Multisig wallet (isOnCurve=False, Squads-style). CONFIRMED: 0.869B distributed as staking/ecosystem rewards (NOT CEX selling). Flow: Multisig → 7Qao1Sqh1mdKVKskFTuQe7ivy4f7Q3rrwzE4QrzMDJKV (0.796B) → HaYTWK3nQuHuGrydBR4Gkc8tRzqDQ7swq8Fnf45DppQi (rewards hub, distributed to ~80+ wallets in 0.001-0.033B micro-amounts Oct-Nov 2025). Also → 8S3BjPnAygsmbGnxpLUNympLoeEnRJhyqHkpuxY6aMdC (rolling monthly micro-distributions to multiple wallets). Zero CEX deposits. Likely Foundation or Community Ecosystem rewards allocation.
